title: oxyceros parvulus
intro: Oxyceros parvulus, also known as the Indian hog plum, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and treating digestive issues, as well as acting as an antibacterial agent. The herbal preparations of Oxyceros parvulus include decoctions, infusions, and powdered extracts, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
